General.Name: Imperium Group Global Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Imperium Technology Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the mobile games, data storage mining, Esports, and home furnishing business in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, East and South Asia, and internationally. The company operates in six segments: Online Game; Cloud Computing; Esports; Household Products; Property Investment; and Money Lending. It is involved in the design, development, and operation of mobile games and computer games; sale of non-fungible tokens (NFTs) and other digital token products; and cryptocurrency and data storage mining and rental of machines for customers in cryptocurrency mining. The company also participates in esports competitions, streaming and marketing events, and merchandise sale activities; and manufactures and sells stainless steel home furnishing products and accessories for kitchens, and bathrooms. In addition, it engages in property investment activities; interest income from money lending business; manufacturing and processing of stainless-steel rods, and other accessories; and esports operation. The company was formerly known as Imperium Group Global Holdings Limited and changed its name to Imperium Technology Group Limited in July 2021. Imperium Technology Group Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: One Harbour Square, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong
